scripts.lint: eslint app src next.config.ts postcss.config.mjs proxy.ts --max-warnings=0 --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
scripts.clean: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.next', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('fs').rmSync('tsconfig.tsbuildinfo', { force: true }); console.log('admin clean ok')"
